positive: A stylized illustration of bioluminescent celestial forest flora and fauna. The main subject is a majestic, stylized grouping of crystalized, glowing mushrooms and winding cosmic vines that interact with geometric constellations. The scene should be viewed from a slight aerial perspective, emphasizing symmetry and a central, focal point. Use a deep indigo and vibrant teal color palette, accented by luminous gold and electric purple gradients. The art style should be a blend of neo-art deco psychedelia and detailed scientific illustration, creating sharp, clean edges and strong silhouettes. The composition must be perfectly balanced and repeatable, ideal for a textile print repeat pattern. Studio lighting, vector quality, high contrast, minimal shadows, intricate details, magical realism.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, realistic photography
